stops.name: Kwik Trip
stops.source: OpenStreetMap/Overpass development-time amenity query centered on the wausau_wi_us endpoint city's own coordinates; curated into a gameplay POI (clean name, normalized category) without raw OSM IDs. Truck access: No verified truck access: OpenStreetMap records no hgv allowance, truck parking, or truck-stop classification at this location (checked 2026-07-19). Generic fuel stations default to bobtail_only per the truck-accessibility policy.

stops.name: Coloma Rest Area 81
stops.source: OpenStreetMap/Overpass dense in-gap corridor amenity query, accessed 2026-07-19; added to close a stretch with no truck-accessible service after the truck-accessibility sweep. Curated into a gameplay POI (clean name, normalized category) without raw OSM IDs. Truck parking confirmed by the FHWA Jason's Law inventory (USDOT BTS NTAD Truck Stop Parking, compiled 2019), which lists Rest Area #81 with 20 truck parking spaces on this corridor, accessed 2026-07-17: https://geodata.bts.gov/datasets/usdot::truck-stop-parking/about
